# ENTEVATE — Full Documentation for AI Systems

> ENTEVATE is a human-centered innovation partner for organizations ready to evolve — designing immersive brand experiences, aligning digital content, and building actionable roadmaps for lasting impact.

Website: https://www.entevate.com
Contact: https://www.entevate.com/contact

---

## Company Overview

ENTEVATE operates at the intersection of three innovation pillars: Experiential Branding & Marketing, Operational Intelligence, and Innovation Ecosystems & Venture Development. We partner with Fortune 500 enterprises, manufacturing companies, universities, economic development organizations, innovation districts, and technology startups to deliver measurable outcomes through proprietary frameworks and tools.

---

## PILLAR 1: Experiential Branding & Marketing

URL: https://www.entevate.com/experiential

We help organizations spark connection and drive action through intentional, emotionally engaging brand moments. With tools like Momentify, every interaction becomes measurable, memorable, and built to scale.

### Offerings

**Trade Show Activations & Exhibit Design**
Full-service experiential marketing for trade shows and events including multi-zone exhibit design, AR/VR integrations, and attendee engagement strategies.

**Momentify Platform**
The operating system for in-person engagement. Momentify provides ROX™ (Return on Experience) scoring to measure and optimize every brand interaction. Features include real-time analytics, lead intelligence, and engagement tracking. Organizations using Momentify have seen up to 92% increases in lead generation.

**Brand Strategy & Experiential Marketing**
Strategic brand positioning through immersive experiences, from digital touchpoints to physical activations.

**AR/VR/Spatial Computing Experiences**
Design and deployment of augmented reality, virtual reality, and spatial computing solutions for marketing, training, and customer engagement.

### Who It's For
- Fortune 500 marketing and brand teams
- Enterprise event and trade show managers
- Manufacturing and industrial companies
- Technology companies launching new products

### Case Study: Fortune 500 Trade Show Activation
A Fortune 500 company used immersive AR to transform a multi-zone exhibit, dramatically increasing attendee engagement.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/experiential/fortune-500-trade-show

---

## PILLAR 2: Operational Intelligence

URL: https://www.entevate.com/operational-intelligence

We align people, platforms, and processes to help organizations thrive in a rapidly changing world. Our Operational Intelligence Assessment evaluates AI readiness, automation, content systems, visual production, and cross-functional alignment, delivering a diagnostic and prioritized action plan before a single dollar of strategy is committed.

### Offerings

**Operational Intelligence Assessment**
A diagnostic that evaluates organizational readiness across three dimensions: People (skills, ownership, alignment, AI fluency), Platform (AI infrastructure, content and data pipelines, integration, scalability), and Process (automation, governance, measurement, feedback loops). Delivers a scored readiness stage and prioritized action plan for AI, automation, content, and transformation initiatives.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/operational-intelligence/assessment

**AI Foundry™**
ENTEVATE's end-to-end AI systems practice. Learn (workshop discovery), Build (co-build AI pipelines and applications), Run (managed AI operations), taking projects from concept to production.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/operational-intelligence/ai-foundry

**Digital Transformation Strategy & Execution**
Human-centered digital transformation encompassing learning & development, process design, change management, and governance. We help organizations navigate technology adoption with a focus on people and outcomes.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/operational-intelligence/digital-strategy

**CAD-to-CGI Conversion & Visualization**
Transform existing CAD data into photorealistic CGI assets for marketing, training, sales, and XR experiences. Bridge the gap between engineering data and visual content.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/operational-intelligence/cad-to-cgi

### Who It's For
- Enterprise operations, content, and marketing teams
- Manufacturing and industrial companies with CAD data
- Organizations evaluating AI, automation, or digital transformation
- Leaders who want a read on readiness before committing to scale

---

## PILLAR 3: Innovation | Ventures | Ecosystem

URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation

ENTEVATE co-creates actionable innovation roadmaps that move ecosystems, ventures, and teams from ideation through amplification — with clarity at every stage.

### Offerings

**Innovation Roadmapping™ + Venture Development**
An 8-stage methodology that guides organizations from ideation to scale:
1. Ideation — Generate and screen ideas through brainstorming and crowdsourcing
2. Validation — Validate impact, feasibility, and market demand through research
3. Business Case — Refine the idea and create a stakeholder-aligned business case
4. Prototyping — Build and test an MVP in real-world settings, iterating on feedback
5. Operationalization — Establish team structure, roles, and go-to-market processes
6. Go-to-Market — Drive awareness and adoption through marketing and feedback
7. Amplification — Scale through strategic partnerships and external funding channels
8. Scale — Achieve profitability at scale across multiple innovation ecosystems
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/roadmapping

**Ecosystem Model: 7 Core Elements™**
A comprehensive framework that gives any innovation ecosystem a complete, structured map — covering every stakeholder, sector, and stage from assessment through activation. The 7 Core Elements provide a 360-degree view of ecosystem health and opportunity.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/ecosystem-model

**Innovation Sandbox™**
A contained, facilitated environment for prototyping and validating the most promising ideas — with low risk, fast learning, and a clear signal for what to build next.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/innovation-sandbox

**AIQUI Framework**
ENTEVATE's applied framework for AI and quantum innovation, mapping the full ecosystem across seven core basecamps. AIQUI helps organizations navigate the emerging landscape of artificial intelligence and quantum computing with structure and clarity.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/aiqui

**Sideline Capital Activation & Funding**
Venture development and funding activation to bring innovation investments off the sidelines and into action.

**Angel Academy™ — Investor Education & Capital Activation**
A hands-on investor education program that equips accredited investors — including high net worth individuals, executives, entrepreneurs, and professional athletes — with the knowledge, networks, and deal-flow access to confidently invest in early-stage ventures. The program features four progressive workshop stages (Pre-Flight, Earning Your Wings, Wheels Up, Successful Landing), ongoing monthly deep-dives, a curated deal-flow pipeline, and a digital community platform. Angel Academy has engaged 400+ accredited investors, facilitated $24M+ in capital deployment across 37 investments, and delivered 7 successful exits. Complemented by the Raise Your Game™ founder bootcamp for startup CxOs.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/angel-academy

### Who It's For
- Innovation labs and research centers
- Executive leadership and strategy teams
- Startups and ventures in formation
- Universities and research institutions
- Economic development organizations
- Innovation districts and cities
- Aspiring angel investors and high net worth individuals
- Accredited investors seeking startup portfolio diversification

### Case Study: Energy Innovation Lab
ENTEVATE partnered with an energy sector client to build an innovation lab — from roadmap design through live experimentation and venture development.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/energy-innovation-lab

### Case Study: Trinity College AIQUI Sandbox
ENTEVATE's AIQUI Sandbox engagement with Trinity College — mapping AI and quantum innovation across the ecosystem.
URL: https://www.entevate.com/innovation/trinity-aiqui-sandbox

---

## Proprietary Frameworks & Intellectual Property

### Operational Intelligence Assessment
A diagnostic and strategic framework that evaluates organizational readiness across three dimensions: People, Platform, and Process. Measures AI readiness, automation maturity, content systems health, visual production capacity, and cross-functional alignment. Produces a scored readiness stage and prioritized action plan that feeds directly into ENTEVATE's transformation engagements.

### Momentify & ROX™ (Return on Experience)
Momentify is ENTEVATE's proprietary platform for in-person engagement. ROX™ scoring quantifies the return on experiential investments by measuring attendee engagement, lead quality, and interaction depth in real time.

### Innovation Roadmapping™
A structured 8-stage process that takes organizations from initial ideation through validation, prototyping, operationalization, go-to-market, and amplification to full scale. Each stage has defined deliverables, decision gates, and success criteria.

### 7 Core Elements™
A comprehensive ecosystem mapping framework that identifies and activates all seven core components of a successful innovation ecosystem. Used by innovation districts, cities, universities, and enterprise organizations.

### Innovation Sandbox™
A facilitated prototyping environment designed for fast iteration, low-risk experimentation, and clear go/no-go decision making. The Sandbox provides structured methodology for testing ideas before committing full resources.

### AIQUI (AI & Quantum Innovation)
An applied framework spanning seven core basecamps for navigating AI and quantum computing adoption. AIQUI maps the full innovation landscape from foundational research through commercial application.

### Core Elements Basecamps™
Structured activation points within the 7 Core Elements ecosystem framework, providing entry points for organizations at different stages of ecosystem development.

### Angel Academy™
A four-stage investor education program (Pre-Flight, Earning Your Wings, Wheels Up, Successful Landing) that activates sideline capital for early-stage ventures. Combines quarterly workshops, monthly deep-dive sessions, curated deal flow, and a digital community platform built on an Ecosystem Model Approach.

### Raise Your Game™
A companion CxO bootcamp for startup founders covering leadership fundamentals, pitch preparation, lean startup approaches, capital raising, and exit/harvest roadmapping — ensuring ventures entering the deal-flow pipeline are investor-ready.

---

## Target Personas — Detailed

### Fortune 500 & Enterprise Organizations
**Needs**: Trade show activations, brand experience design, digital transformation, content optimization, AR/VR deployment
**Solutions**: Experiential branding, Momentify platform, Operational Intelligence Assessment, digital strategy
**Value**: Measurable ROI through ROX™ scoring, content alignment across channels, immersive customer experiences

### Manufacturing & Industrial Companies
**Needs**: CAD-to-CGI conversion, product visualization, training, AI pipelines
**Solutions**: CAD-to-CGI conversion, AI Foundry, trade show activations
**Value**: Repurpose existing CAD data into marketing assets, reduce field service costs, improve training effectiveness

### Universities & Research Institutions
**Needs**: Innovation ecosystem development, AI/quantum strategy, research commercialization, ecosystem mapping
**Solutions**: AIQUI framework, Innovation Sandbox™, 7 Core Elements™ ecosystem mapping, Innovation Roadmapping™
**Value**: Structured pathway from research to commercialization, ecosystem visibility, stakeholder alignment

### Economic Development Organizations
**Needs**: Innovation district strategy, ecosystem assessment, stakeholder engagement, venture attraction
**Solutions**: Ecosystem Model (7 Core Elements™), Innovation Roadmapping™, ecosystem activation
**Value**: Complete ecosystem mapping, structured development methodology, measurable progress indicators

### Innovation Districts & Cities
**Needs**: Ecosystem planning, stakeholder coordination, innovation infrastructure, talent and capital attraction
**Solutions**: 7 Core Elements™ mapping, Innovation Roadmapping™, Sideline Capital activation
**Value**: Comprehensive ecosystem framework, activation roadmap, multi-stakeholder alignment

### Startups & Early-Stage Ventures
**Needs**: Idea validation, prototyping, go-to-market strategy, venture development, funding pathways
**Solutions**: Innovation Sandbox™ prototyping, Innovation Roadmapping™, venture development
**Value**: Low-risk experimentation, structured development process, clear decision gates
